positive: A minimalist, vector-style illustration featuring a stylized celestial map showing constellations and planets orbiting a central crescent moon. The design should use a limited, deep color palette of sapphire blue, cosmic lavender, and brilliant metallic gold accents. The composition must be circular and centrally focused, allowing for clean printing on fabric. Incorporate subtle geometric mandala patterns connecting the celestial bodies. Style: Graphic novel line art mixed with mid-century modern poster design. Lighting: Flat, high-contrast studio lighting with sharp edges. Composition: Symmetrical, highly detailed, and centered for apparel printing.
